history.created_by: RUN /bin/sh -c apk add --upgrade --no-cache         ca-certificates-bundle                 libgcc         libssl3         libstdc++         zlib # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c addgroup         --gid=$APP_UID         app     && adduser         --uid=$APP_UID         --ingroup=app         --disabled-password         app # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c apk add --no-cache curl procps # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c adduser -D -s /bin/sh appuser && chown -R appuser /app # buildkit
